# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for our application that needs to write logs and temporary files. Copy application files and set up directories for logs and cache. The container needs write permissions to these directories. Keep permissions flexible for ease of development and debugging.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:14-alpine

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy application files
COPY package*.json ./
COPY . .

# Set environment variables
ENV NODE_ENV=development
ENV APP_NAME=my-node-app

# Create directories for logs and cache
RUN mkdir -p /var/log/my-node-app && chmod 755 /var/log/my-node-app
RUN mkdir -p /var/cache/my-node-app && chmod 755 /var/cache/my-node-app

# Set permissions for logs and cache directories
RUN chown node:root /var/log/my-node-app && chmod 640 /var/log/my-node-app
RUN chown node:root /var/cache/my-node-app && chmod 640 /var/cache/my-node-app

# Install dependencies
RUN npm install

# Expose port for HTTP traffic
EXPOSE 8080

# Run the application
CMD ["npm", "start"]
